nasb.text: that is, the mystery which has been hidden from the past ages and generations, but has now been manifested to His saints,

esv.text: the mystery hidden for ages and generations but now revealed to his saints.

ccb.text: 这道是历世历代一直隐藏的奥秘，现在已经向祂的众圣徒显明了。

csbs.text: 这话语就是历世历代被隐藏的奥秘，但如今已经显明给他的圣徒们。
